_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of low-level computer languages (e.g., assembly languages).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of Python programming language fundamentals for data applications, including data structures, control flow, object-oriented and functional programming patterns, standard library capabilities, and the data science ecosystem (NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn).
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-008 (AI, cosine: 0.479), TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.450).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.448). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [assembly, computer, languages, level, low] vs WIDAI-only terms [applications, capabilities, control, data, ecosystem, flow] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.887, R=0.839). P exceeds R by 0.048 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 30 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (92.5%). "Knowledge of low-level computer languages (e.g., assembly languages)." and "Knowledge of Python programming language fundamentals for data applications, inc" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.529 > STS 0.448 (gap +0.081). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [assembly, computer, languages, level, low]. WIDAI-only: [applications, capabilities, control, data, ecosystem, flow].
